l2_raw: {"sentences": ["The researcher encrypted the sensitive data and stored it in a secure server.", "The system administrator backed up the file to an off-site location for redundancy.", "A junior analyst accidentally shared the backup link via an unsecured messaging app.", "The link was intercepted by a hacker who deleted the file and replaced it with a fake version.", "By the time the breach was detected, the original information had vanished without a trace."]}
l2_sentences: The researcher encrypted the sensitive data and stored it in a secure server.
The system administrator backed up the file to an off-site location for redundancy.
A junior analyst accidentally shared the backup link via an unsecured messaging app.
The link was intercepted by a hacker who deleted the file and replaced it with a fake version.
By the time the breach was detected, the original information had vanished without a trace.
